name: /spec accepts a feature description argument and emits at least one failing test file
command: mkdir -p tests profiles && printf 'extends: [google:tsguide]\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "user can log in with email and password" --profile profiles/p.yaml --tests-out tests --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned_tests>=1' out.txt && grep -q 'feature_description=user can log in' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
